devdoc.author: Hardhat & TS Course Student (Mentored by Antigravity)

checkUpkeep(bytes).details: This is the function that the Chainlink Keeper nodes look at      to see if they should trigger `performUpkeep`.      The following conditions must be true for upkeepNeeded to be true:      1. Time interval must have passed      2. Raffle must have at least 1 player and some ETH balance      3. Subscription must be funded with LINK      4. Raffle state must be OPEN (we shouldn't trigger if we are already calculating a winner!)

params.callbackGasLimit: Gas limit for the callback fulfillRandomWords call
params.gasLane: Key hash (max gas price you are willing to pay for request)
params.interval: Time interval (in seconds) between lottery rounds
params.subscriptionId: Subscription ID funded with LINK for Coordinator fees
params.vrfCoordinatorV2Plus: Address of the Chainlink VRF V2.5 Coordinator contract on Sepolia or local mock

performUpkeep(bytes).details: Requests a random number from Chainlink VRF V2.5 to draw the winner.      Automatically called by Chainlink Keeper nodes when checkUpkeep returns true.

devdoc.title: Raffle Smart Contract

acceptOwnership().notice: Allows an ownership transfer to be completed by the recipient.

enterRaffle().notice: Allows a player to enter the lottery by paying the entrance fee

setCoordinator(address).notice: Sets the VRF Coordinator addressThis method should only be callable by the coordinator or contract owner

transferOwnership(address).notice: Allows an owner to begin transferring ownership to a new address.

userdoc.notice: This contract implements a decentralized, verifiably fair lottery using Chainlink VRF V2.5         and Chainlink Automation (Keepers).
